title: Spryzeen's Falling Leaves
body:
# Spryzeen's Falling Leaves
![cover](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/SVKEogYL/images/a9d2ef30122da698cc78929c535654afe38be8ff.png)

Falling leaves is a bushy-leaves type resourcepack inspired for a concept art featured on minecoin.
It gives to the environment a new look unlike any pack of bushy leaves that has come before. 

> To get a nice look FAST leaves style use it with Improved Fast Leaves (https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/spryzeens-improved-fast-leaves)
<details>
<summary>Features</summary>

- Full vanilla texture pack, you don't need any mod or something.
- Unique bushy leaves style.
- Optimized models (Less perfomance impact than other bushy leaves resourcepacks).
- More inmersive environment.

</details>

<details>
<summary>Requirements</summary>

- None!

</details>

<details>
<summary>Known Issues</summary>

- None!

</details>
